name: Sourdough French Bread#4
recipeIngredient: 1 cup sourdough starter at room temperature
recipeInstructions:
1. Take the sourdough starter out of the fridge 4 to 8 hours before starting the bread. Feed it, then let it reach room temperature as it digests the feeding (half a cup of all-purpose flour mixed with half a cup of water).
2. Measure everything except the water into your machine, set for French Bread, and turn on.
3. Drizzle the water slowly while the machine is running to allow stopping before adding half a cup, if the flour has absorbed much humidity from the air.
4. For an extra crispy crust, lightly spray the dough with water during the final rise (after forming the loaf) and slash the top for a fancy look.
